name: OS Patching Survey
description: Survey for patch.yml — refresh repos + upgrade packages (apt/dnf/yum)

spec.question_description: Environment label / safety gate. A live prod run prints a prominent warning. Make sure the Job Template inventory/limit matches this selection.
When true the update only reports what would change (check_mode) and never reboots.
Space- or comma-separated package names to exclude from the upgrade (e.g. 'kernel docker-ce nginx'). Leave BLANK to fall back to each host's inventory value (skip_packages_default).
Reboot the host after upgrade only when the OS reports a reboot is required. Ignored during a dry run.
